seed_gold_caps.fact_text: Keith is a 58-year-old male
seed_gold_caps.speaker: clinician

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: Keith is being seen for evaluation of high blood sugar
seed_gold_caps.speaker: clinician

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The patient reports his blood sugar is not under control
seed_gold_caps.speaker: patient

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The patient has been checking his blood sugars at home
seed_gold_caps.speaker: patient

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The patient feels his home blood sugar readings have been creeping up slightly
seed_gold_caps.speaker: patient

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The patient's home blood sugar readings have been in the 300s
seed_gold_caps.speaker: patient

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The patient reports his diet has not changed recently
seed_gold_caps.speaker: patient

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The patient does not take sugar with his tea
seed_gold_caps.speaker: patient

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The patient believes most of his sugar intake comes from fruit
seed_gold_caps.speaker: patient

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The patient denies recent fever
seed_gold_caps.speaker: patient

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The patient denies recent chills
seed_gold_caps.speaker: patient

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The patient reports a bit of right knee joint pain
seed_gold_caps.speaker: patient

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The patient does not recall any specific injury or event causing his right knee pain
seed_gold_caps.speaker: patient

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The patient was nauseous a couple of days ago
seed_gold_caps.speaker: patient

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The patient attributes his nausea a couple of days ago to sitting in the back of a car
seed_gold_caps.speaker: patient

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The patient dislikes sitting in the back of a car
seed_gold_caps.speaker: patient

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The patient denies vomiting recently
seed_gold_caps.speaker: patient

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The patient denies recent belly pain
seed_gold_caps.speaker: patient

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The patient denies dysuria or burning with urination
seed_gold_caps.speaker: patient

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The patient has a history of reflux
seed_gold_caps.speaker: clinician

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The patient has been treated with protonix for reflux
seed_gold_caps.speaker: clinician

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The patient feels his reflux is a bit better since starting protonix
seed_gold_caps.speaker: patient

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The patient no longer wakes up at night with reflux
seed_gold_caps.speaker: patient

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The patient has a history of congestive heart failure
seed_gold_caps.speaker: clinician

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The patient has not noticed recent weight gain
seed_gold_caps.speaker: patient

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The patient has not noticed recent fluid retention
seed_gold_caps.speaker: patient

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The patient prefers to sleep on his side
seed_gold_caps.speaker: patient

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The patient is able to sleep lying flat when on his side
seed_gold_caps.speaker: clinician

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The patient has a history of right rotator cuff problems
seed_gold_caps.speaker: clinician

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The patient reports his right rotator cuff is now surprisingly good
seed_gold_caps.speaker: patient

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: On exam the clinician feels the patient's thyroid is a bit enlarged
seed_gold_caps.speaker: clinician

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: On exam the patient's heart rhythm is regular
seed_gold_caps.speaker: clinician

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: On exam the patient's lungs are clear
seed_gold_caps.speaker: clinician

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: On exam the patient's abdomen is soft
seed_gold_caps.speaker: clinician

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: On exam the patient's right knee has erythema
seed_gold_caps.speaker: clinician

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: On exam the patient's right knee has an insect bite with associated fluctuance
seed_gold_caps.speaker: clinician

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: On exam the patient has lower extremity edema on the right side
seed_gold_caps.speaker: clinician

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The patient's vital signs are within normal limits per clinician review
seed_gold_caps.speaker: clinician

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The patient's Lyme titer is a little elevated
seed_gold_caps.speaker: clinician

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The clinician plans to further evaluate the elevated Lyme titer
seed_gold_caps.speaker: clinician

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The patient has a positive rapid strep test
seed_gold_caps.speaker: clinician

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The clinician assesses that the patient has hyperglycemia
seed_gold_caps.speaker: clinician

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The clinician believes the patient's hyperglycemia is probably related to infections in his body
seed_gold_caps.speaker: clinician

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The clinician believes the positive strep infection is a reason the patient's blood sugar is high
seed_gold_caps.speaker: clinician

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The clinician plans to treat the patient's strep infection with amoxicillin 500 mg three times a day
seed_gold_caps.speaker: clinician

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The clinician instructs the patient to take all of the prescribed amoxicillin even if he starts feeling better
seed_gold_caps.speaker: clinician

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The clinician orders amoxicillin 500 mg three times a day for 10 days
seed_gold_caps.speaker: clinician

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The clinician plans to order a Lyme western blot PCR to evaluate for acute Lyme disease
seed_gold_caps.speaker: clinician

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The clinician orders a western blot PCR test for Lyme disease
seed_gold_caps.speaker: clinician

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The nurse will set the patient up for the ordered tests
seed_gold_caps.speaker: clinician

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The clinician confirms that the elevated Lyme titer is related to Lyme disease
seed_gold_caps.speaker: clinician

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The patient expresses fear of having alpha-gal syndrome
seed_gold_caps.speaker: patient

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The clinician does not think the patient has alpha-gal syndrome
seed_gold_caps.speaker: clinician

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The patient has eaten meat over the last couple of days
seed_gold_caps.speaker: patient

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The clinician states that the patient's elevated blood sugar may represent an inflammatory response
seed_gold_caps.speaker: clinician

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The clinician plans to order additional tests related to the patient's concern about alpha-gal syndrome or inflammation
seed_gold_caps.speaker: clinician

seed_gold_caps.fact_text: The clinician advises the patient to call if anything happens after the visit
seed_gold_caps.speaker: clinician
